title: MATANA 20 Clear Hard Plastic Dinner Plates, 25cm / 10 Inch - Elegant & Reusable Party Tableware for Weddings, Birthdays, Picnic, BBQ, Parties
features: GREAT VALUE : This pack includes 20 premium quality dinner plates that are as clear as glass, each measuring 25cm in diameter, ensuring you have plenty for your gatherings.
PREMIUM QUALITY : Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, these plates mimic the elegance of glassware without the fragility. They're durable and perfect for any occasion.

ELEGANT & STURDY : Impress your guests with the elegance of these clear dinner plates. They're not only elegant but also sturdy, making them perfect for weddings, birthdays, Christmas, BBQs, picnics, family gatherings, and garden parties. Plus, they're reusable, reducing waste and saving you money.

VERSATILE AND PRACTICAL : These clear plastic plates are incredibly versatile. Whether you're hosting a formal dinner party or a casual picnic, they're suitable for all occasions. Their clear design complements any table setting, making them a practical choice for any event.

EASY TO CLEAN : After your event, simply wash these plates for future use. Their reusable nature makes them an eco-friendly choice, and they'll stand up to multiple washes, ensuring you can enjoy them again and again.
description: Product Description Variety of Elegant Options Our tableware come in various sizes, shapes and easy serving of different food options. This is especially useful for events with many guests. Perfect for every occasion Whether it's weddings, birthdays, BBQs, picnics or garden parties, these elegant plastic tablewares are the ideal choice for adding a touch of class to any event. Raise a toast to unforgettable moments! Elegant Design The tableware are crystal clear and transparent, providing a visually appealing showcase for your food. Guests can see the layers and textures of your creations, enhancing the overall dining experience. Wash and Reuse Our clear tableware are reusable, making them a sustainable choice. After your event, cleaning them is a breeze – simply wash them with mild soap and warm water, and they're ready for your next gathering.
